# Double Hathi

> Premium Kachi Ghani (cold-pressed) mustard oil brand from Aditya Oil Industries, Bharatpur, India — trusted since 1989. B2B focused: seeking distributors, wholesalers, super-stockists and bulk buyers across India.

Double Hathi produces 100% pure, chemical-free mustard oil using the traditional Kachi Ghani cold-pressing method. Available in 200ml, 500ml, 1L, 5L and 15L packs for the trade channel.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, process, product range, and how to partner with Double Hathi.
- [Products](/products): Full range of Kachi Ghani mustard oil pack sizes for the trade.
- [1 Litre Pouch](/products/1): Best-selling 1L pouch for retail shelves.
- [200ml Bottle](/products/2): Trial-size 200ml pack.
- [500ml Pouch](/products/3): Mid-size 500ml pouch.
- [5 Litre Jar](/products/4): Bulk 5L jar for HoReCa and family packs.
- [15 Litre Tin](/products/5): Wholesale 15L tin for caterers and bulk buyers.
- [Distributor Inquiry](/dealer-inquiry): Apply to become a Double Hathi distributor, wholesaler, or stockist.
